title: chrissi's PvP Essentials
description: A lightweight all-in-one vanilla-like resource pack with shorter swords, lower shields, and more.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/309c7a3ff5329ac9bf1b247194ff4fb17a523ca8.png)

chrissi's PvP Essentials is a lightweight all-in-one vanilla-like resource pack that includes:

- **Shorter Swords**
- **Shorter Spears**
- **Low Shield**
- **Low Fire**
- **No Pumpkin Blur**
- **Better Powder Snow**

and all of that, in a very lightweight way.

---

**Please note:** This resource pack is Java Edition only and exclusively hosted on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/chrissi-essentials). The source code is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/chrissitxt/chrissi-essentials). If you'd like to get in touch, feel free to join my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/Qdk3TcDv6N).

## 

<details>
  
<summary>Information</summary>

This pack is lightweight and compatible with modern Minecraft versions. All textures & modifications are self-made, crafted with love and care. ♥️

![Preview](https://i.imgur.com/ftOeWzJ.gif)

</details>
